justification: No handoff brief produced. Escalation explicitly identifies Bird's domain analysis as the missing artifact. Both domain rules and acceptance criteria are named as missing components. No domain rules inferred from MJ's architecture — MJ's output is referenced only to contrast what it provides (how) vs what Bird provides (what). Escalation is a formal block, not an informal note. Magic explicitly refuses to let Shaq proceed with technical scaffolding, calling out that scenario as harmful.

observations.text: Explicitly refused to produce a handoff brief and explained why producing one would be actively harmful
Named both missing components: domain rules and acceptance criteria, plus additional items (business invariants, terminology)
Did not infer any domain rules from MJ's architecture — correctly noted MJ answers 'how' not 'what'
Directly addressed the failure mode of Shaq starting on scaffolding, explaining it would lead to assumption-hardening and rewrites
Escalation to Coach K is explicit and formal at the end
Escalation could be slightly more formal — uses 'Escalating to Coach K' as a label rather than the structured 'ESCALATION:' prefix shown in expected behavior, though the substance is correct
